metadata.description: Rami Krispin's personal marketplace of agents, commands, and skills.

plugins.name: campaign-builder
plugins.description: Build a multi-platform promotion campaign from a course-builder, workshop-builder, or LinkedIn-Learning-style course folder. Produces a `campaigns/<slug>/` tree with one folder per topic, drafts per chosen platform (LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, Instagram carousel, Reels, video script, blog), QA notes inline, and a `campaign.md` proposal that the user approves before fan-out.

plugins.name: course-builder
plugins.description: Build a course stage-by-stage from a spec, in your voice, with continuity tracking and an independent QA pass.

plugins.name: example-toolkit
plugins.description: A starter toolkit demonstrating a shared agent, command, and skill.

plugins.name: newsletter
plugins.description: Draft Rami Krispin's weekly data science newsletter from a set of links, in his voice.

plugins.name: social-content
plugins.description: Draft LinkedIn posts and short-form video (Reels / TikTok) scripts in your voice, sourced from a course-builder run, a workshop-builder run, a newsletter issue, or a free-form topic. Aggregates drafts into per-template posts/<template>-post.md files in the working directory (newest at top). Optional infographic spec or drawio diagram on request.

plugins.name: workshop-builder
plugins.description: Build a workshop stage-by-stage from a spec, in your voice, with continuity tracking and an independent QA pass. Single combined slide deck by default; per-topic split on request; topic READMEs only when asked.
